2","s":"wp-granny-2","g":"Horror","i":"","p":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/web-ports/granny-2@main/index.html"}]; const SITE = "https://c00lkiddtech.live"; const grid = document.getElementById('grid'); const empty = document.getElementById('empty'); const countEl = document.getElementById('count'); const q = document.getElementById('q'); const genreSel = document.getElementById('genre'); const chips = document.getElementById('chips'); const player = document.getElementById('player'); const frame = document.getElementById('frame'); const ptitle = document.getElementById('ptitle'); let activeGenre = ''; let currentUrl = '';
const genres = [...new Set(GAMES.map(g => g.g).filter(Boolean))].sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b)); for (const g of genres) { const o = document.createElement('option'); o.value = g; o.textContent = g; genreSel.appendChild(o); const chip = document.createElement('button'); chip.type = 'button'; chip.className = 'chip'; chip.textContent = g; chip.dataset.genre = g; chip.addEventListener('click', () => { activeGenre = activeGenre === g ? '' : g; genreSel.value = activeGenre; syncChips(); render(); }); chips.appendChild(chip); }
function syncChips() { for (const c of chips.querySelectorAll('.chip')) { c.classList.toggle('active', c.dataset.genre === activeGenre); } }
function escapeHtml(s) { return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); }
function playUrl(game) { if (game.p) return game.p; if (game.s) return SITE + '/playables/play/' + encodeURIComponent(game.s); return ''; }
function render() { const term = (q.value || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const genre = activeGenre || genreSel.value || ''; const list = GAMES.filter(g => { if (genre && g.g !== genre) return false; if (!term) return true; return (g.t + ' ' + g.s + ' ' + g.g).toLowerCase().includes(term); }); countEl.textContent = list.length + ' / ' + GAMES.length; grid.innerHTML = ''; empty.style.display = list.length ? 'none' : 'block'; const frag = document.createDocumentFragment(); for (const g of list) { const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.type = 'button'; btn.className = 'card'; btn.title = g.t; btn.innerHTML = '<img class="thumb" loading="lazy" decoding="async" alt="" src="' + escapeHtml(g.i || '') + '" onerror="this.style.opacity=.25" />' + '<div class="meta"><div class="title">' + escapeHtml(g.t) + '</div><div class="tag">' + escapeHtml(g.g || '') + '</div></div>'; btn.addEventListener('click', () => openGame(g)); frag.appendChild(btn); } grid.appendChild(frag); }
function openGame(g) { const url = playUrl(g); if (!url) return; currentUrl = url; ptitle.textContent = g.t; player.classList.add('open', 'busy'); player.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); document.body.classList.add('playing'); frame.onload = () => player.classList.remove('busy'); frame.src = url; }
function closeGame() { player.classList.remove('open', 'busy'); player.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); document.body.classList.remove('playing'); frame.onload = null; frame.src = 'about:blank'; currentUrl = ''; }
document.getElementById('back').addEventListener('click', closeGame); document.getElementById('reload').addEventListener('click', () => { if (!currentUrl) return; player.classList.add('busy'); frame.src = currentUrl; }); document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape' && player.classList.contains('open')) closeGame(); }); q.addEventListener('input', render); genreSel.addEventListener('change', () => { activeGenre = genreSel.value; syncChips(); render(); }); render();
